◎简　　介  

　　16-year-old friends Laura and Christine have always been best friends, until the mysterious and exciting Maria comes along. Laura is instantly fascinated by Maria, and finds herself dragged into Marias world of parties, sex and lies. Christine feels left out and cannot understand why Laura has turned her back on her. Laura must decide - should she stay with her best friend, or ...
